metadata.title: BachatAppStudio — The App for bachata masters and students
metadata.description: Teach and learn bachata easy. Play with the stems, adjust the speed, separate instruments and master bachata & merengue with professional tools.

hero.badge: Trusted by pro bachata dancers & musicians
hero.subtitle: Play with instruments, rhythms, syncopations, speeds and counts — taking your knowledge and your students' to the next level. The ultimate immersive practice experience, powered by the best instructors and musicians of the genre.

mixer.title: Play with the stems. Adjust the speed.
mixer.description: Adjust the volume of each instrument individually, highlighting the one you need during your classes. Go ahead — try the mixer.

featureSplit.eyebrow: Master Bachata & Merengue with smart tools
featureSplit.title: Adjust BPM, separate stems, and create something unique.
featureSplit.text: Teach and learn with precision and professionalism, backed by the world's top bachata dancers and musicians.

features.title: Perfected by dancers and
features.description: No more switching between apps or wasting time looking for ways to improve your classes. Explore, adapt, and master bachata with tools designed to let your creativity flow without limits.
items: Control the speed of any track to practice without frustration.
Learn to dance in different timings with clarity and precision.
Break down bachata styles into clear, easy-to-understand sections.
Play with bachata instruments and their unique combinations.
Detect rhythmic changes and their early cues like a pro.
Master syncopation to add dynamism and surprise to your dancing.
Dive into the essence of merengue — learn it and bring it to your classes.
Save your favorite tracks and exercises all in one place.
bodies: Perfect for beginners and advanced dancers who want to refine details at their own pace. Slow down to understand, speed up to challenge yourself and grow with confidence. Your progress, your rhythm—without losing the essence of the music.
Train your ear to recognize rhythmic variations and adapt effortlessly. Explore how the energy of the dance shifts with the tempo. A key tool to master every musical timing like never before.
Discover the roots, structures, and nuances of each variation. Learn how each style is danced with guided musical examples. Perfect for those seeking both depth and technique at once.

Switch rhythms, percussion, and variations to create your own version in real time with no delays. Explore musicality like never before with this powerful tool. Turn your ear into your best guide for improvisation and flow.
Train your sensitivity to play with the accents of the requinto and the base. Learn to anticipate, respond, and shine musically while dancing. Connect body and music in a natural and exciting way.

Create amazing routines and adapt the count to your custom footwork. Enhance your musical expression by playing with syncopated patterns and developing your interpretation. Make your dance more dynamic, fun, and musically rich.

Discover every type of merengue and its unique nuances, play with each instrument in real time, and create an immersive experience during practice, understanding and enjoying the world's happiest genre. Perfect for enriching your dancing with history, flavor, and roots. Feel the rhythm of merengue... and make it a part of you.

Enjoy all your music and adjust the speed without distortion or loss of quality. Organize your practice sessions and access your content anytime. Your dance evolution deserves a complete experience—and BachatApp Studio takes care of it.

appHeadline.title: The app for bachata masters and students.
appHeadline.text: Play with instruments, rhythms, timing, syncopations, speeds and counts — taking your knowledge and your students' to the next level. The ultimate immersive practice experience powered by the best instructors and musicians of the genre.

cta.downloadHeading: Professional tools accessible to every teacher and student.
cta.readyHeading: Are you ready to take your dancing to the next level?

miniReviews.title: Professional and direct
miniReviews.text: The best app to teach and learn how to dance bachata. Perfect!

miniReviews.title: Emotional and heartfelt
miniReviews.text: It feels like dancing in the heart of the Dominican Republic. Pure magic!

miniReviews.title: Technical and convincing
miniReviews.text: Crystal-clear sound, real musicians, and an intuitive design. Nothing else compares.

musicians.title: Trusted by professional musicians and dancers.
musicians.text: Play with instruments, rhythms, timing, syncopations, speeds and counts.

testimonials.title: Discover why thousands of bachata teachers and students
items: BachatAppStudio has made structuring my classes so much easier. The level-based sections and music tracks are perfect for teaching technique and rhythm.
I always struggled with keeping the rhythm, but with this app everything is so clear and intuitive that I finally feel like I'm truly dancing.
The sound quality is amazing. I use it not only for bachata, but to introduce my students to merengue and bolero. A true gem!
Finally, a tool created with real knowledge of our culture. This app has essence, history, and a rare musical quality.
I've never learned so quickly. Everything is super well explained and organized. The interface feels like it was made for me.
I use the app in my group classes. My students are hooked on the practice dynamics — like a professional teaching assistant.
A revolution for those of us teaching Latin rhythms! It's saved me time and gives me top-quality material.
The design is intuitive, practical, and elegant. I love how it goes from the basics to advanced — the real instruments make all the difference.

video.title: Professional tools accessible to every teacher and student.

privacy.title: BachatApp Studio Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Thank you for trusting BachatApp Studio ("we," "our," or "the App"). We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring a safe experience when using our services. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect the personal information you provide to us.
privacy.s1a: 1.1. Personal information provided by the user:
s1aList: Name, email address, and login credentials.
Optional profile information such as photo, country, and role (student or teacher).
s1bList: IP address, device type, operating system, browser, and activity within the app.
s1cList: Interaction statistics within the app: features used, frequency, and usage patterns.
privacy.s2Intro: We use the collected data to:
s2List: Provide access to our features and services.
Personalize your experience within the app.
Improve service performance, content, and security.
Send relevant notifications (you can disable them in settings).
Comply with legal obligations and prevent fraud or misuse.
privacy.s3a: We do not sell or rent your personal information.
privacy.s3b: We may share data in the following cases:
s3List: With service providers supporting the App's infrastructure, storage, payments, etc.
When required by legal processes or regulatory compliance.
In the event of a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, with prior notice.
privacy.s4: We implement administrative, technical, and physical security measures to protect your personal data. However, no system is completely secure. In case of breaches, you will be notified as required by applicable laws.
s5List: Access, correct, or delete your personal information.
Withdraw your consent at any time.
privacy.s5Contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s6: We retain your data while your account is active or as necessary to fulfill the purposes described. Upon account closure, your data will be deleted or anonymized unless a legal obligation requires retention.
privacy.s7: We use cookies and similar tools to enhance user experience, remember preferences, and analyze usage trends. You can manage cookies through your device settings.
privacy.s8: The app is not intended for users under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors without parental or guardian consent.
privacy.s9: We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy. Any substantial changes will be notified through the App or by email. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.s10: If you have questions, requests, or concerns about this Privacy Policy, contact us at:
privacy.trademark: BachatApp Studio is a registered trademark. All rights reserved.

terms.title: Terms And Conditions — BachatApp Studio
terms.s1: By accessing the apps, users consent to these terms, applicable laws, and responsibility for local law compliance. Disagreement prohibits service use. Materials are protected by copyright and trademark law.
terms.s2a: 2.1. Users may temporarily download one copy per device for personal, non-commercial viewing only—a license grant, not title transfer.
s2List: 2.3. Using for commercial purposes or public display
terms.s2c: 2.7. License automatically terminates upon violation and may be terminated anytime. Users must destroy downloaded materials upon termination.
terms.s3: Materials are provided "as is" with no warranties. The company disclaims all warranties including "implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose."
terms.s4: BachatApp Studio and suppliers bear no liability for damages from service use or inability to use, regardless of prior notification of potential harm.
terms.s5: Materials may contain errors. The company makes no accuracy or completeness warranties and may modify content without notice or update commitment.
terms.s6: The company hasn't reviewed linked sites and isn't responsible for their contents. Links don't imply endorsement. Users access linked sites at their own risk.
terms.s7: Terms may be revised without notice; continued use indicates acceptance of current terms.
terms.s8: Terms are governed by UAE law with exclusive jurisdiction in UAE courts.

metadata.title: For Artists — BachatAppStudio
metadata.description: Upload your stems and let dancers, teachers and festivals worldwide study and use your music inside BachatApp Studio.

hero.eyebrow: Built for bachata and tropical music artists
hero.title: Your Music. Studied Worldwide.
hero.lead: Let dancers, teachers and festivals experience your music like never before. Upload your stems and position your sound inside a global movement where artists are discovered, studied and celebrated.
hero.note: You keep full ownership of your music. You only grant usage rights inside BachatApp Studio.

stats.title: Global
stats.text: Reach dance schools, teachers and festival communities around the world.

stats.title: Educational
stats.text: Your arrangements can be studied by instrument, structure and musicality.

stats.title: Non-exclusive
stats.text: You keep your copyright while allowing meaningful usage inside the platform.

value.title: More than streams. Your music becomes a reference.
value.lead: BachatApp Studio helps artists move beyond passive listening. Your music is experienced in classes, workshops and festival spaces where people pay attention to timing, texture, instruments and feeling.

items.title: Global exposure that feels intentional
items.text: Your music reaches dancers, instructors and event communities who actively look for songs that inspire training, performance and musicality.

items.title: Studied, not just heard
items.text: Listeners can isolate parts, understand arrangements and connect more deeply with what makes the song special.

items.title: Useful in schools and festivals
items.text: Your stems can support classes, workshops and festival programming worldwide.

items.title: Become a reference artist
items.text: Artists who share music for deeper learning stand out in bachata, merengue, salsa and dembow scenes.

how.title: A simple path from upload to worldwide dance floors.
how.lead: The process is intentionally frictionless. You provide your stems, we prepare them for the platform, and your music becomes part of an experience used by dancers and educators around the world.

steps.title: Upload your stems
steps.text: Send separated instruments or grouped production files in common formats.

steps.title: We integrate your music into BachatApp Studio
steps.text: Your tracks are prepared for interactive learning so users can explore arrangement details with clarity.

steps.title: Dancers worldwide learn and use your music
steps.text: Teachers, schools and festivals can use the music for classes, workshops and educational sessions.

form.title: Submit your music in one smooth flow.
form.cardSubtitle: Tell us who you are and how your music should be positioned inside the platform.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Share your story, sound, trajectory, influences or why your music should be featured.
form.descriptionTip: Tip: mention your style, audience and what makes your catalog stand out.
form.uploadSubtitle: Upload your stems (separate instruments preferred). Multiple files are supported.
form.dropTitle: Drag and drop your files here
form.dropSubtitle: Or click to browse. Accepted: WAV and MP3.
form.agreementSubtitle: Simple language, clear scope and artist-first rights protection.
form.agreementP1: The artist retains full ownership and copyright of all submitted music and stems at all times.
form.agreementP2: The artist grants BachatApp Studio a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to host, reproduce, process, display and make the stems available within the platform for educational, promotional and experiential purposes.
agreementBullets: Use the music for educational purposes
Use the music in dance classes, workshops and festivals worldwide
form.agreementP3: The music will not be resold or redistributed as standalone commercial music content. The purpose of this license is educational, promotional and experiential within the platform.
form.agreementP4: This license is non-exclusive, meaning the artist remains free to distribute and commercialize the music elsewhere.
form.agree: I agree to the terms and grant usage rights as described above
form.errEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
form.errDescription: Please add a short artist description.
form.errFiles: Please upload at least one stem or audio file before submitting.
form.errAgree: You must agree to the usage rights terms before submitting.
form.errBig: This file is very large and may fail to upload. MP3 is recommended.
form.success: Submission received. Your music package is ready for review, and our team will follow up for the next integration step.

cta.heading: Are you a musician? Share your sound with the world.
cta.subtitle: Upload your stems to BachatApp Studio
